title: Leo's Mods
description: A modpack with over 100+ mods to get the best performance and the best looking game quality for the best experience.
body:
Leo's Mods is a meticulously crafted ModPack designed to elevate your Minecraft experience with a combination of performance enhancements and visual enhancements. Here's a breakdown of some key mods included:

1. **Sodium**: This cutting-edge rendering engine is integrated into Leo's Mods to drastically boost performance. By optimizing how Minecraft's graphics are processed, Sodium ensures smoother gameplay even on lower-end hardware.

2. **Iris Shaders**: With Iris Shaders, you can immerse yourself in stunning visuals without sacrificing performance. This mod is engineered to work seamlessly with existing OptiFine shader packs, allowing you to customize your Minecraft world with beautiful lighting and effects.

3. **Xaero Minimap**: Navigation becomes a breeze with the Xaero Minimap. This handy mod displays a map of your surroundings, complete with terrain, player positions, and other important points of interest. You can even set waypoints to mark locations for easy reference, making exploration more efficient than ever before.

The, mods in Leo's Mods ModPack offer a balanced blend of performance optimization and visual enhancement, ensuring that your Minecraft adventures are both smooth and visually stunning.
